s2-channel-drift.passes: ChannelDrift.frag → WGSL pass; signalDamageExecution.ts switched; gpuSignalDamage.ts deleted; pixel parity ≤ 2/255 on per-channel offset fixtures

s3-effect-filter2d.passes: Filter2dAdjust.frag → WGSL pass; effectExecution.ts and stageMaskComposite.ts switched (using mask/maskedBlend); gpuFilter2dPostProcessing.ts and gpuMaskedCanvasBlend.ts deleted; pixel parity ≤ 2/255

s4-effect-mask.passes: effectMask.ts switched to existing mask/{linearGradient,radialGradient,brushStamp,rangeGate,maskInvert} passes; gpuLocalMaskShape.ts and gpuLocalMaskRangeGate.ts deleted; pixel parity ≤ 2/255 on linear/radial/brush/range fixtures
